summary: Completed P0 Stripe Subscription testing. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend feature gating verified: Pricing page shows 3 tiers (Free/Pro/Elite), Reports page shows PDF lock icons and upgrade prompts for free users, Dashboard shows Early Trend upgrade prompt for free users, Product Detail page shows LockedContent for Score Breakdown section.

issues: Non-blocking console error: 'Failed to fetch notifications: DataCloneError' - related to Emergent parent frame communication, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Backend: API health check passed
Backend: GET /api/stripe/plans returns 3 plans (Free/Pro/Elite), no Starter
Backend: Plans pricing correct: Free=£0, Pro=£39, Elite=£99, Currency=GBP
Backend: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session with plan='pro' returns Stripe URL
Backend: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session with plan='elite' returns Stripe URL
Backend: Checkout endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/stripe/create-portal-session works for authenticated users
Backend: POST /api/stripe/cancel-subscription works for authenticated users
Backend: POST /api/stripe/webhook accepts checkout.session.completed event
Backend: POST /api/stripe/webhook accepts customer.subscription.deleted event
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns correct features for free user (pdf_export=false, early_trends=false)
Backend: Feature access endpoint requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly-winning-products/pdf returns 403 for free users
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/early-opportunities returns 403 for free users
Backend: GET /api/stripe/subscription returns plan and features
Backend: Feature-access returns store limits (max_stores, can_create_store, current_store_count)
Frontend: Pricing page shows 3 plan cards (Free £0, Pro £39, Elite £99)
Frontend: Pro plan has 'Most Popular' badge
Frontend: Feature comparison table visible on pricing page
Frontend: No Starter tier present on pricing page
Frontend: Reports page shows 'Free Plan' badge and PDF buttons with lock icons for free users
Frontend: Reports page shows 'Unlock Full Reports' upgrade prompt for free users
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Unlock Early Trend Detection' with 'Upgrade to Elite' button for free users
Frontend: Product Detail page shows LockedContent blur overlay for Score Breakdown section
Frontend: Product Detail shows 'Upgrade to Pro to access score breakdown' prompt
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration is live with real test keys - checkout sessions create actual Stripe URLs
Webhook endpoint correctly handles events with or without signature verification (for testing)
Admin users (by email) automatically get Elite features via admin_bypass
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe subscription implementation complete. Key endpoints: /api/stripe/plans (lists Free/Pro/Elite), /api/stripe/create-checkout-session (creates Stripe checkout), /api/stripe/feature-access (returns user's plan features), /api/stripe/webhook (handles subscription events). Frontend gating: PricingPage at /pricing shows 3 tiers, ReportsPage shows PDF lock for free users, DashboardPage shows EarlyTrendUpgradePrompt for non-Elite, ProductDetailPage shows LockedContent on Score Breakdown and Market Intelligence for free users.

stripe_billing.GET /api/stripe/plans: PASS - returns Free/Pro/Elite, no Starter, currency=GBP
stripe_billing.POST /api/stripe/create-portal-session: PASS - returns portal URL or appropriate error

feature_access.admin_features: PASS - admin users get Elite access via admin_bypass

frontend_feature_gating.reports_page_pdf_lock: PASS - lock icons on PDF buttons for free users
frontend_feature_gating.product_detail_locked_content: PASS - Score Breakdown shows blur + lock overlay for free users
